testCases.title: Cart Persistence - Price Updates While Signed Out
testCases.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: requires Admin SPA access to mutate product price during session. playwright-firefox slot has no Admin SPA access.

testCases.title: Cart Validation - Out of Stock After Add
testCases.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: requires Admin SPA access to set product inventory to 0 during test. playwright-firefox slot has no Admin SPA access.

testCases.title: Cart Validation - Price Change After Add
testCases.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: requires Admin SPA access to update product price during session. playwright-firefox slot has no Admin SPA access.

testCases.title: Cart Validation - Product Unpublished After Add
testCases.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: requires Admin SPA access to unpublish product during session. playwright-firefox slot has no Admin SPA access.

testCases.title: Cart Validation - Mixed Valid and Invalid Items
testCases.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: requires Admin SPA access to make one item invalid/OOS while keeping another valid. playwright-firefox slot has no Admin SPA access.

testCases.title: Price Increase During Session
testCases.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: requires Admin SPA access to increase product price during storefront session. playwright-firefox slot has no Admin SPA access.

testCases.title: Price Decrease During Session
testCases.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: requires Admin SPA access to decrease product price during storefront session. playwright-firefox slot has no Admin SPA access.

testCases.title: Discount Removal During Session
testCases.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: requires Admin SPA access to remove/disable a promotion during storefront session. playwright-firefox slot has no Admin SPA access.

testCases.title: Price Change During Session - Admin Increases Price
testCases.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: requires Admin SPA access to mutate product price. playwright-firefox slot has no Admin SPA access.

testCases.title: Price Change During Session - Price Drop With Indicator
testCases.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: requires Admin SPA access to decrease product price during session. playwright-firefox slot has no Admin SPA access.

testCases.title: Item Goes Out of Stock While in Cart
testCases.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: requires Admin SPA access to set product inventory to 0 while item is in cart. playwright-firefox slot has no Admin SPA access.

testCases.title: Checkout Blocked by Out-of-Stock Item
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: requires PROD_OOS (QA-OOS-001, stock=0) pre-seeded into cart before test execution. /qa-seed-data not run for this session.

testCases.title: Stale Cart Price Warning - Admin Price Change During Session
testCases.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: requires Admin SPA access to change product price while item is in cart. playwright-firefox slot has no Admin SPA access.

testCases.title: Tier Price Update When Quantity Drops Below Threshold
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: admin price list tier rule (qty>=10 = reduced price, qty<10 = standard price) not configured for PROD_TIER_PRICED (CISCO-SW24-001). Product is accessible in catalog with flat -20% promotion discount only; no tier pricing rule observable at qty=10 vs qty=5.

testCases.title: Cart Validation - Removed/Unavailable Product in Cart
testCases.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: requires Admin SPA access to deactivate/unpublish a product. playwright-firefox slot has no Admin SPA access.

testCases.title: Cart Validation - Multiple Simultaneous Errors Displayed
testCases.notes: SEED REQUIRED: requires OOS item (@td(PROD_OOS.sku)) + over-stock item simultaneously pre-seeded in cart. /qa-seed-data not run for this session.
